data.title: ticket-revert.sh: REVERT event uses int(time.time()) -> mixed ns/s precision across event log
data.description: ticket-revert.sh still uses int(time.time()) for REVERT event timestamps (line ~134) while all sibling scripts (ticket-create.sh, ticket-compact.sh, ticket-link.sh, ticket-transition.sh) were migrated to time.time_ns(). REVERT events are not read by detect_status_flap() so no current correctness issue. However, the mixed precision across event types could confuse future reducers or readers that normalize timestamps globally.
